sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐντεύθεν

- Transliteration: Enteuthen

- Phonetic: ent-yoo'-then

- Definition:

1. from this place, hence

2. on the one side and on the other, on each side

- Origin: from the same as G1759

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From the same as G1759; hence (literally or figuratively); (repeated) on both sides: - (from) hence on either side.
